rules.name: Production DB backups
rules.description: All production databases must have automated backups enabled.
rules.remediation: Enable automated backups and retention for this production database in your cloud console or IaC, then refresh the snapshot and re-scan.

rules.name: Encryption at rest
rules.description: All databases must use encryption at rest.
rules.remediation: Enable encryption at rest or migrate to an encrypted instance; update Terraform/CloudFormation or console, re-import inventory, and re-scan.

rules.name: No public production DBs
rules.description: Production databases cannot be publicly accessible.
rules.remediation: Disable public accessibility; use private subnets and restrict security groups to trusted sources only, then re-scan.

rules.name: Production HA replicas
rules.description: Production databases must have at least 2 replicas for HA.
rules.remediation: Add read replicas or cluster capacity so replicaCount is at least 2; roll out via change management and re-scan.

rules.name: Dev/staging cost-optimized DB classes
rules.description: Non-production databases should use burstable or smaller instance families.
rules.remediation: Change instance class to an allowed burstable/smaller family (e.g. db.t3/db.t4g) in dev/staging, update IaC, refresh inventory, and re-scan.
